message:
feat(gateway): implement Context Pack Builder with Token Budgeting

Implements the core context orchestration component that assembles
optimized context for agent prompts:

- Token budget allocation with proportional distribution and minimums
- Tokenizer service for token counting and text truncation
- Section builders for triage, memory, search, and history (stub impls)
- REST API endpoints: build, preview, render
- Comprehensive unit tests (36 tests)

The section builders currently return empty sections - they will be
populated when BV, CM, and CASS integrations are completed.

Closes flywheel_gateway-45c

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
